competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Ali Olwan (Jordan) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Offside, Argentina. Giovani Lo Celso is caught offside.
Corner, Argentina. Conceded by Husam Abu Dahab.
Attempt missed. Nicolás Otamendi (Argentina) header from the right side of the six yard box is too high. Assisted by Giovani Lo Celso with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 尼古拉斯·奥塔门迪射门偏出。 乔瓦尼·洛塞尔索参与进攻。
莫汉纳德·阿布塔哈 黄牌

qualifiers.espnText: Giovani Lo Celso (Argentina) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

events.description: 乔瓦尼·洛塞尔索 进球

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Corner, Argentina. Conceded by Husam Abu Dahab.
Lautaro Martínez (Argentina) hits the bar with a left footed shot from very close range. Assisted by Nicolás Tagliafico following a corner.

events.description: 劳塔罗·马丁内斯射门偏出。 尼古拉斯·塔利亚菲科参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Penalty Argentina. Marcos Senesi draws a foul in the penalty area.
Delay in match because of an injury Marcos Senesi (Argentina).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
VAR Decision: Penalty Argentina.

events.description: 劳塔罗·马丁内斯 进球

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Giovani Lo Celso (Argentina).
Foul by Exequiel Palacios (Argentina).

events.description: 埃塞克尔·帕拉西奥斯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Nico Paz (Argentina).
Attempt blocked. Odeh Fakhoury (Jordan) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked.

events.description: 奥德·法库里射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Jordan. Conceded by Nicolás Tagliafico.
Attempt blocked. Mohannad Abu Taha (Jordan) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked.
Attempt missed. Ali Azaizeh (Jordan) header from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Ali Olwan with a cross.

events.description: 阿里·阿扎伊泽射门偏出。 阿里·奥尔文参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Exequiel Palacios (Argentina) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Lautaro Martínez (Argentina).
Fourth official has announced 5 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时1分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Marcos Senesi (Argentina) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Yazan Al Arab (Jordan).
Offside, Argentina. Nicolás Otamendi is caught offside.
Attempt saved. Julián Alvarez (Argentina) left footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Yazeed Abulaila (Jordan). Assisted by Lautaro Martínez.

events.description: 阿尔瓦雷斯射正。 劳塔罗·马丁内斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Jordan. Odeh Fakhoury is caught offside.
First Half ends, Jordan 0, Argentina 2.

events.description: 马哈茂德·阿尔马尔迪 登场，奥德·法库里 离场
穆萨·阿尔塔马里 登场，阿里·阿扎伊泽 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half begins Jordan 0, Argentina 2.
Offside, Argentina. Lautaro Martínez is caught offside.
Foul by Nicolás Tagliafico (Argentina).

events.description: 尼古拉斯·塔利亚菲科犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Nicolás Tagliafico (Argentina) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Mousa Al Tamari (Jordan) left footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Ali Olwan.

events.description: 穆萨·阿尔塔马里射门偏出。 阿里·奥尔文参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Lautaro Martínez (Argentina) hits the bar with a right footed shot from outside the box. Assisted by Giovani Lo Celso.

events.description: 劳塔罗·马丁内斯射门偏出。 乔瓦尼·洛塞尔索参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Nico Paz (Argentina) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the right.

source.name: 懂球帝
source.note: 懂球帝公开比赛概览 tendencies.data；正值为主队攻势，负值为客队攻势。

h2h.reason: 暂未找到两队的历史交锋记录

summary.source: 懂球帝 App 公开数据层 + FIFA 公开赛事接口
summary.sourceNote: 历史记录来自懂球帝 App 公开全量球队赛历（含友谊赛），并以 FIFA 公开赛事接口交叉核验；每场均保留原始来源回链。

dongqiudiSource.emptyReason: 懂球帝全量球队赛历未列出此前直接交锋

source.licenseNotice: 赛程、比分、阵容、事件和榜单来自本地 FIFA 官方公开 JSON 快照；生产展示仍需确认 FIFA 条款和授权边界。
